lore.item.aether_additions.skyroot_cross: A lightweight Skyroot crossbow that fires an additional arrow with every shot.
lore.item.aether_additions.holystone_cro: A sturdy Holystone crossbow that fires three arrows in a spread pattern.
lore.item.aether_additions.zanite_crossb: A Zanite crossbow that deals more damage as its durability decreases.
lore.item.aether_additions.gravitite_cro: A Gravitite crossbow that fires arrows unaffected by gravity.
lore.item.aether_additions.vampire_cross: A cursed crossbow that restores a small amount of health to the shooter when its arrows hit a target.
message.aether_additions.moa_flute.full: 恐鸟笛中已经装有一只恐鸟
message.aether_additions.moa_flute.not_t: 只能收入玩家驯养的恐鸟
message.aether_additions.moa_flute.has_p: 请先让恐鸟和乘客分离
message.aether_additions.moa_flute.block: 这里没有足够空间释放恐鸟
